## createStaticTokenAuthHook() function

Creates a reusable static-token request hook.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createStaticTokenAuthHook<Session = unknown>(
  options: StaticTokenAuthHookOptions<Session>,
): AuthHook<Session>;
```

**Returns:**

[AuthHook](./pi-ws.authhook.md)<!-- -->&lt;Session&gt;

Async-capable request hook.

## Remarks

This is both a ready-made auth hook and a compact example of how custom hooks can deny requests and attach session data.
